title: rondeletia odorata subsp. odorata
intro: Rondeletia odorata subsp. odorata, also known as the fragrant rondeletia, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Rondeletia odorata subsp. odorata include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Rondeletia odorata subsp. odorata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to create topical ointments and salves.
